info.title: dmarc-parser API
info.description:
REST API of the DMARC aggregate report parser & ingestion service.

### Authentication
Every `/api/v1/*` route (except `/api/v1/openapi.json`) requires an API
key from `PARSER_API_KEYS`, sent either as `Authorization: Bearer <key>`
or `X-API-Key: <key>`. Keys carry scopes from `{read, ingest, admin}`;
each operation documents its required scope via `x-required-scope`.
Missing/invalid key → 401; key without the required scope → 403.

### Rate limiting
Per-key token bucket (`PARSER_RATE_LIMIT_RPS`, default 10 req/s,
burst 3x). Exceeding it returns 429 with a `Retry-After` header.

### Conventions
All timestamps are UTC, RFC 3339. Date-only values accepted by `since` /
`until` parameters use `YYYY-MM-DD`. Errors are JSON
`{"error": "message"}`.

servers.description: From containers on the mxsentinel_default / dmarcparser_default networks

tags.name: intel
tags.description: Sender intelligence (sources, IP metadata, new-sender tracking)

tags.name: stats
tags.description: Rollup analytics, domain health and enforcement readiness

tags.name: reports2
tags.description: DKIM selectors, TLS-RPT and forensic (ruf) reports

get.description: 200 when the DB is reachable and the last successful poll is recent; 503 otherwise. Includes per-rule watchdog alert states.

post.description: Body may be raw XML, gzip, or zip (any Content-Type), or multipart/form-data with a file field. Zip archives may contain multiple reports; all are processed. Duplicates (same domain + report_id) are no-ops returning the existing serial.

201.description: At least one new report stored

post.summary: Trigger an immediate IMAP poll cycle (async)

get.summary: Poller state, lifetime counters and DB totals

get.description: 404 when the serial is unknown or raw_xml was purged by the retention job (PARSER_RAW_XML_RETENTION).

get.summary: Stream flattened report×record rows (CSV or JSONL)
get.description: Chunked streaming export of every record row matching the filters, joined with its report metadata. CSV has a header row; JSONL emits one ExportRow object per line.

get.summary: Threat list of sending IPs across all domains
get.description: Per-IP totals, failed message counts, targeted domain count and ip_meta enrichment, ordered by failing messages descending.

parameters.name: min_failed
parameters.description: Only IPs with at least this many failing messages

get.summary: Cross-report activity and metadata for one IP

parameters.name: ip
parameters.description: IPv4 or IPv6 address (v4-mapped v6 is unmapped)

get.summary: Domain overview with 30d volume, alignment, policy and health score

get.description: Weights: alignment 40, trend 15, policy strength 20, coverage 10, unknown-source failing volume 15.
Pure rule engine over 30/90-day alignment and failing sources. Recommendation is one of enforce | step_pct | fix_alignment | monitor.

get.summary: DKIM selector inventory for one domain

200.description: Selector inventory with first/last seen and pass/fail counts

post.description: Acked sources stop being reported as new senders.

get.summary: Message volume / alignment timeseries from daily rollups
One TLS-RPT report with per-policy rows

get.description: Recipient localparts are redacted at store time when PARSER_RUF_REDACT is on.

post.summary: Requeue all mail from the Failed folder
post.description: Moves every message in the Failed IMAP folder back to INBOX (cleared of \Seen) and triggers an immediate poll cycle.
Attempts one synchronous delivery for every un-replayed webhook_deadletter row (oldest first, max 500 per call); successful deliveries are marked replayed.

post.summary: Subscribe an email address to a domain's weekly digest

post.description: Sends a digest for every subscription immediately, bypassing the weekly schedule guard. Intended for testing.

bearerAuth.description: API key from PARSER_API_KEYS as a bearer token. Key scopes: read, ingest, admin (see each operation's x-required-scope).

apiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
apiKeyAuth.description: Same API key via the X-API-Key header.

Forbidden.description: API key lacks the required scope

alerts.description: Watchdog rule states (silence, poll_failures, failed_spike, webhook_dead)

ExportRow.description: One flattened report×record row (JSONL export; CSV columns match in order)

reports.description: Latest 100 report records featuring this IP

raw_headers.description: Only present on the single-report endpoint
